channel.title: Plank — Changelog
channel.description: What's new in Plank, the calm markdown notes app. New features, improvements, and fixes — shipped roughly every two weeks.

item.title: New — Daily notes & a calendar in the sidebar (v2.4.0)
item.description: Open a fresh note for any day with ⌘D. A month calendar in the sidebar marks days that already have a note, daily-note templates support placeholders like {{date:dddd}}, and ⌘[ / ⌘] jump between yesterday and tomorrow.

item.title: Fixed — Sync conflicts on large vaults (v2.3.2)
item.description: Phantom "conflicted copy" files on 5,000+ note vaults are gone — Plank now compares content hashes and millisecond timestamps instead of second-resolution mtimes. The sync indicator no longer hangs on folder rename, and initial indexing uses ~40% less memory.

item.title: Improved — Full-text search that keeps up with your typing (v2.3.0)
item.description: Search rebuilt on a new on-disk index returns results in under 15ms on a 10,000-note vault. New operators tag:#idea, path:journal/ and "exact phrase", recent and saved searches, and recency-aware ranking.

item.title: New — Wikilinks and a live backlinks panel (v2.2.0)
item.description: Type [[ to link to any note with title autocomplete and create-on-the-fly. Every note now has a backlinks panel, hover previews, and rename-safe links that update every [[reference]] automatically.

item.title: Fixed — Pasted code blocks keep their indentation (v2.1.1)
item.description: Plank now preserves leading whitespace exactly inside fenced code blocks, Tab inserts a tab instead of moving focus, smart quotes are disabled inside code, and the cursor no longer jumps after pasting a long block.

item.title: Improved — A faster, smarter command palette (v2.1.0)
item.description: The ⌘K command palette is now fuzzy, ranked, and learns your most-used commands. New quick actions — Move note…, Pin to sidebar, Export to PDF — and it opens in about half the time on first launch.

item.title: New — Plank 2.0: a brand-new editor core (v2.0.0)
item.description: A from-scratch rewrite for live-preview editing: markdown styles itself as you type, with raw syntax shown only on the cursor's line. Native tables, callouts, task lists and inline math, local-first .md files, and a new theming engine.
